primary_claim: FibroDynMix runs a pooled raw-count NB fit with study effects and leave-dataset-out transfer diagnostics across multiple public fibroblast count datasets.
claim_boundary: Default registry uses two public mouse breast fibroblast count matrices from the Dryad record doi:10.6071/M3238R. This strengthens real-data validation beyond a single pooled smoke run but is not yet an independent multi-study human atlas validation.
